briefs.title: Designated Accommodation Area Tax extended to 2030 in four BC regions
briefs.summary: BC extended the Designated Accommodation Area Tax expiry dates in four regions from early 2025 to 2030, effective January 1, 2025. Hotels and short-term accommodation operators in those areas must continue collecting and remitting this tax.
briefs.action_required: Confirm your property is in an affected area and continue collecting the Designated Accommodation Area Tax through 2030.

key_dates.label: BC Designated Accommodation Area Tax extension takes effect
